RAINBOW_TELEPHONE_POLE.title: Rainbow Telephone Pole
RAINBOW_TELEPHONE_POLE.pages.INITIAL.des: While climbing the tower, you come across a telephone-pole-like object shimmering with seven colors of light. A part of it seems about to open on its own.
RAINBOW_TELEPHONE_POLE.pages.INITIAL.opt: She doesn't seem to want to be refused
RAINBOW_TELEPHONE_POLE.pages.ACCEPT_LIGH: You can't bear to leave her here alone after all.
TAKETORI_MONOGATARI_EVENT.title: Taketori Monogatari
While climbing the tower, you find a storybook. It seems to tell the legendary tale of Princess Kaguya. Your gaze is drawn to it.
TAKETORI_MONOGATARI_EVENT.pages.READ.des: The Princess Kaguya in the story seems to smile at you.
TAKETORI_MONOGATARI_EVENT.pages.IGNORE.d: You close the book, but feel a faint regret. Your body feels weak, but your purse seems heavier.
TAKETORI_MONOGATARI_EVENT.pages.NO_PARTN: Strangely, the storybook contains no story at all. You leave disappointed.
MOON_NEWS.title: Tsukuyomi News
MOON_NEWS.pages.INITIAL.description:
Woof woof! Reporting live on the scene, this is Loyal Dog Takumi!
Still full of energy today, starting the broadcast as usual!
MOON_NEWS.pages.LISTEN.description: You listen carefully to the news and learn something about the Yachiyo Cup.
MOON_NEWS.pages.REJECT.description: You wave your hand and feel a sense of relief.
YACHIYO_CUP_EVENT.title: Yachiyo Cup
YACHIYO_CUP_EVENT.pages.INITIAL.descript: You enter the Yachiyo Cup based on what you heard in the news. Who is your opponent?
Challenge Iro P, obtain a [gold]Rare Relic[/gold]
Randomly challenge a member of Black Onyx and receive their reward
YACHIYO_CUP_EVENT.pages.WIN_KAGUYA.descr: You defeated Kaguya and Iro P!
YACHIYO_CUP_EVENT.pages.LOSE.description: You lost, but your opponent mercifully gave you some consolation.
YACHIYO_CUP_EVENT.pages.GIVE_UP.descript: You choose to forfeit, and your opponent doesn't give you a hard time.
VIRTUAL_YOU_TUBER_HARUKU.title: Virtual YouTuber Haruku
VIRTUAL_YOU_TUBER_HARUKU.pages.INITIAL.d: You meet a healing-style Virtual YouTuber from Tsukuyomi. He recommends a few methods to you.
VIRTUAL_YOU_TUBER_HARUKU.pages.INITIAL.o: [gold]Remove[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] cards from your [gold]deck[/gold], add a [purple]Boring[/purple] to your deck.
VIRTUAL_YOU_TUBER_HARUKU.pages.HOT_SPRIN: The steam from the hot spring soothes your body and mind. You feel much better.
VIRTUAL_YOU_TUBER_HARUKU.pages.COUNSELIN: After some counseling, you feel so bored...
VIRTUAL_YOU_TUBER_HARUKU.pages.LISTENING: The gentle words warm your heart.
VIRTUAL_YOU_TUBER_TERE_LILY.title: Virtual YouTuber Tere Lily
VIRTUAL_YOU_TUBER_TERE_LILY.pages.INITIA: You meet a strong, independent Virtual YouTuber from Tsukuyomi. You prepare to ask her for advice:
Add [green]2[/green] [gold]Elemental Arrow[/gold] cards to your deck.
VIRTUAL_YOU_TUBER_TERE_LILY.pages.HUNTIN: Tere Lily teaches you hunting skills.
VIRTUAL_YOU_TUBER_TERE_LILY.pages.ELF.de: Tere Lily guides you through elven mysticism.
FIREWORKS_FESTIVAL.title: Fireworks Festival
FIREWORKS_FESTIVAL.pages.INITIAL.descrip:
Spectacular fireworks bloom in the night sky, with great hustle and bustle.
You see a small stall selling various snacks.
FIREWORKS_FESTIVAL.pages.INITIAL.options: Quietly enjoy the fireworks, then leave.
FIREWORKS_FESTIVAL.pages.NOT_ENOUGH_GOLD: You don't have enough Gold. You leave regretfully.
FIREWORKS_FESTIVAL.pages.REWARDS.options: Remove a card from your [gold]deck[/gold] and obtain a [gold]Candy Apple[/gold].
FIREWORKS_FESTIVAL.pages.DECLINE.descrip: You quietly enjoy the fireworks, then leave.
EIGHT_THOUSAND_YEARS_MEMORY.title: Eight Thousand Years of Memory
EIGHT_THOUSAND_YEARS_MEMORY.pages.INITIA:
While climbing the tower, you encounter a mysterious sea slug.
Will you accept eight thousand years of longing?
Accept the longing. Each touch will cost {HpLoss} Max HP, and [gold]transform[/gold] 1 card in your [gold]deck[/gold].
Lose [red]6[/red] HP, add a [red]Normality[/red] to your [gold]deck[/gold].
EIGHT_THOUSAND_YEARS_MEMORY.pages.TRANSF: [jitter][gold]And so, a baby girl emerged from the telephone pole![/gold][/jitter]
[jitter]Compared to what I felt after meeting you and falling in love...[/jitter]
[jitter]The person you want to see is right there, aren't they?[/jitter]
[jitter]I wish I could witness your era with my own eyes.[/jitter]
[jitter]This is the only place I have...[/jitter]

[jitter]Time is like fine wine; our memories only get better with age.
Waiting isn't all bad, you know.[/jitter]
Your brain seems unable to handle the massive influx of information.
[jitter][gold]What an idiot I am. Why did I only realize it now?[/gold][/jitter]
EIGHT_THOUSAND_YEARS_MEMORY.pages.REJECT: You turn away. The sea slug behind you seems very displeased.
METEOR_SHUTTLE_EVENT.title: Meteor Shuttle
METEOR_SHUTTLE_EVENT.pages.INITIAL.descr: While climbing the tower, you suddenly crash into a huge meteor. It seems to have a significant impact on you.
METEOR_SHUTTLE_EVENT.pages.INITIAL.optio: Lose [red]half[/red] your Max HP and travel to [gold]8000 years ago[/gold].
Lose [red]{HpLoss}[/red] HP, and remove [gold]{Cards}[/gold] cards from your deck.
METEOR_SHUTTLE_EVENT.pages.RESIST.descri: You struggle with all your might, but feel drained and faint... When you come to, you find yourself at the entrance of the tower.
METEOR_SHUTTLE_EVENT.pages.SUBMIT.descri: You choose to endure silently, letting the meteor's power erode you. You feel a weakness, as if you've lost something.
METEOR_SHUTTLE_EVENT.pages.loss: The world line shifts. You failed to seize this opportunity.
KAGUYA_ENDING.title: True Ending
